FIRE.name: Fire
FIRE.pillar: Deals ramping damage to a single target. The longer it focuses on the same enemy, the more damage it deals — similar to an inferno beam.
FIRE.charm: Grants +15% attack damage to all pillars within the Alchemist's aura range.

WATER.name: Water
WATER.pillar: Slows enemies hit by its attacks, reducing their movement speed.
WATER.charm: Grants +15% attack speed to all pillars within the Alchemist's aura range.

AIR.name: Air
AIR.pillar: Knocks enemies back along the path on each hit.
AIR.charm: Grants +15% range to all pillars within the Alchemist's aura range.

EARTH.name: Earth
EARTH.pillar: Has a very slow attack speed. Each attack stuns all enemies within its range for 0.5 seconds.
EARTH.charm: Grants +5% attack speed, +5% attack damage, and +5% range to all pillars within the Alchemist's aura range.

GOLD.name: Gold
GOLD.pillar: Does not attack enemies. Passively generates gold over time.
GOLD.charm: Pillars within aura range earn +10% bonus gold when defeating an enemy.

ICE.name: Ice
ICE.pillar: Freezes enemies solid on hit. Has a slow attack speed.
ICE.charm: Pillars within aura range build up frost — every 3rd attack triggers a freeze. The first attack after the freeze thaws deals 300% damage.

LIFE.name: Life
LIFE.pillar: Does not actively attack. Revives enemies killed within its range as allied units at the end of the path.
LIFE.charm: Pillars within aura range gain a kill frenzy — after defeating an enemy, their next attack deals 250% damage.

LIGHT.name: Light
LIGHT.pillar: Deals damage proportional to the enemy's current health — the more HP they have, the harder it hits.
LIGHT.charm: For each enemy within aura range, all pillars in range receive +4% attack damage.

POISON.name: Poison
POISON.pillar: Each attack poisons the target for 5 seconds. Poison stacks. Reduces healing efficiency of affected enemies by 75% (stacks).
POISON.charm: Attacks from pillars within aura range reduce enemy healing by 40%. This effect stacks.

STEAM.name: Steam
STEAM.pillar: Pushes enemies back along the path based on their current health — lower HP enemies are pushed further back.
STEAM.charm: Pillars within aura range deal +25% bonus damage against boss enemies.
